case_title: TUCKSON LARRY VS AUTO SERVICE CENTER et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY TUCKSON LARRY AS TO DEFENDANT AUTO SERVICE CENTER WYNN OIL CO PRODUCT WARRANTY DIVISION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-12-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 06
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT AUTO SERVICE CENTER
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERTIFIED RECEIPT TO TIM HURTON RETURNED, NOT SIGNED BY ADDRESSEE.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TUCKSON LARRY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT AUTO SERVICE CENTER WYNN OIL CO PRODUCT WARRANTY DIVISION STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
